About Broadsafe Services

Trusted security solutions provider with a commitment to excellence, integrity and reliability across Australia.

Our Story Contact Our Team

Our Story

Learn about our journey and values

Company History

Broadsafe Services Pty Ltd is a trusted provider of comprehensive security solutions, delivering reliable protection to clients across Australia. What began as a small team with a strong vision has grown into a leading name in the security industry, recognised for tailored services and a commitment to quality.

For years, Broadsafe has been safeguarding businesses and communities nationwide. We combine advanced security technology with a highly trained workforce to ensure dependable, responsive and effective service in every region we operate.

Our reputation is built on core values that guide everything we do integrity, professionalism and reliability. As client needs continue to evolve, Broadsafe remains committed to innovation and excellence, ensuring we remain the preferred security partner for organisations throughout Australia.

Our Mission & Values

The principles that guide everything we do at Broadsafe Services

Integrity

We conduct all business with honesty and transparency, building trust with every client interaction.

Commitment

We are dedicated to the safety and security of our clients, going above and beyond to deliver excellence.

Innovation

We embrace new technologies and strategies to stay ahead of emerging security challenges.

Our Impact

Numbers that showcase our commitment and reach

100+ Security Professionals
1000+ Satisfied Clients
24/7 Service Availability
Nationwide Coverage

Why Choose Broadsafe?

What sets us apart in the security industry

Certified Professionals

All our security personnel are fully licensed, trained and certified to the highest industry standards.

24/7 Availability

Round-the-clock service with rapid response teams ready to deploy anywhere in Australia.

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art security systems integrated with expert human oversight for maximum protection.

Custom Solutions

Tailored security strategies designed specifically for your unique requirements and challenges.

Proven Track Record

Years of excellence with hundreds of satisfied clients and industry recognition.

Ready to Experience the Broadsafe Difference?

Contact us today for a free security assessment and customised solution

Broadsafe Services Security acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of the land on which we work and live and recognise their continuing connection to land, sea and culture. We pay respect to Elders past, present, emerging and extend that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander people around the country.

Keeping You Safe, 24/7

Providing professional security solutions across Australia with 24/7 availability and rapid response.
